name: Nairobi Integrated Flood Risk Management Plan
blocking_factor: Inter-agency coordination failure — WRMA and NCC dispute jurisdiction over riparian corridors
notes: Core drainage masterplan exists on paper; implementation stalled after Phase 1

name: Riparian Reserve Enforcement (30m buffer)
blocking_factor: Political economy — riparian land has high commercial value; enforcement actors face pressure not to act
notes: Legal framework exists under Water Act 2016; gazette notices issued but not actioned

name: Mathare River Channelisation and Embankment
blocking_factor: Budget absorption — procurement process restarted three times; contractor disputes
notes: Phase 1 design completed; civil works at 18% after 4 years

name: Nairobi Drainage Master Plan Implementation
blocking_factor: Competing priorities — drainage budget consistently reallocated to road works during election years
notes: JICA-funded masterplan technically sound; implementation rate well below schedule

name: Early Warning System for Informal Settlements
blocking_factor: Inter-agency coordination failure — data sharing MOU between KMD and NCC never executed
notes: Pilot in Mathare showed 6-hour lead time achievable; not scaled

name: Kibera Stormwater Management Infrastructure
blocking_factor: Land tenure — informal settlement status creates legal ambiguity for permanent infrastructure
notes: Swales and retention ponds installed in Sectors 1-3; Sectors 4-7 pending

name: Building Code Enforcement in Flood Zones
blocking_factor: Political will — enforcement creates constituency conflict; MCAs routinely intervene to halt demolitions
notes: NCA has mandate; enforcement personnel exist; political interference documented

name: Community Flood Resilience Training Programme
notes: Successfully reached 12000 residents across 8 settlements; model for replication

name: Ngong River Desilting and Corridor Restoration
blocking_factor: Budget absorption — funds released but not spent; WRMA capacity constraints
notes: River carries 3x design sediment load; desilting contract awarded twice without completion

name: Flood-Resilient Housing Subsidy Scheme
blocking_factor: Political economy — scheme threatens informal settlement landlord interests; draft circulated but not gazetted
notes: Most ambitious intervention; highest lives-at-risk multiplier; zero implementation progress
